pi_items.source: docker-compose.yml: ports configuration maps port 80 on container to port 80 on host
Web search confirmed Emoncms admin module uses /admin/users route for user list view (userlist_view.php)
Could not verify exact menu label structure from available documentation
setup_emoncms.sh line 146: creates admin user with username='admin'
setup_emoncms.sh line 148: creates admin user with password='admin'
Valid Emoncms username format (alphanumeric with underscore). setup_task.sh confirms john_doe is the target user for this task
Valid standard email format (user@domain.com with period in local part). Emoncms supports this format
Emoncms password requirements: 4-250 characters. 'JohnDoe123' is 10 characters, meeting requirements
Real, publicly-available Docker image from OpenEnergyMonitor organization. Latest version is v10.8.5 per Docker Hub
docker-compose.yml line 5 specifies mariadb:10.11 as database service
docker-compose.yml line 29 specifies redis:7.0-alpine as cache service

privileged_info_summary: The create_user task uses real Emoncms software (openenergymonitor/emoncms:latest, v10.8.5) running in Docker with MariaDB 10.11 and Redis 7.0. The application is accessible at http://localhost with default admin credentials (username: admin, password: admin). The task requires navigating to the /admin/users page where a new user (john_doe, john.doe@example.com, password: JohnDoe123) must be created. All technical details about the URLs, credentials, and password requirements have been verified against official Emoncms documentation and the actual setup scripts.
